modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: D2L email storage full prevents sending messages

full_description_text:  
No puedo enviar correos en D2L.  
El correo está lleno.  
Los estudiantes no pueden enviarme correos.  
Recibo un mensaje de error sobre el almacenamiento.
